syntax.description: Declares the protobuf syntax version. proto3 is the current version.

message.description: Defines a structured data type. Field numbers must be unique within a message.

service.description: Defines a gRPC service with RPC methods.

rpc.description: Defines a remote procedure call method within a service.

enum.description: Defines an enumeration. First value must be 0 (default/unspecified).

oneof.description: At most one field in the oneof can be set at a time. Setting one clears others.

repeated.description: A repeated field represents a list/array. Can contain zero or more elements.

map.description: Map field for key-value pairs. Keys must be integral or string types.

import.description: Import definitions from another proto file.

package.description: Declares the namespace to prevent name collisions between proto definitions.

option.description: File, message, or field-level options. Common: go_package, java_package.

stream.description: Used in RPC definitions for client-streaming, server-streaming, or bidirectional streaming.

int32.description: 32-bit signed integer. Inefficient for negative numbers; use sint32 instead.

String.description: Text data type representing a sequence of characters.

Number.description: Numeric data type for integer and floating-point values.

Boolean.description: Logical type with two values: true and false.
